label: no

Since I'm always facing forward, moving left or right would be relative to that facing. Wait, but when I move left or right, does that change my facing direction? Hmm, no, because the instruction says "always face forward," so I assume I keep facing the same direction throughout. So left and right are relative to my initial forward direction.
